title: Nutty Crisp Croatian Nuts Stir-fry
description: A savory one-pot dish featuring crispy nuts, saffron, and other Mediterranean spices for a paleo-friendly twist on traditional Croatian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Mashed with some oil for added depth

instructions: Soak almonds and pistachios overnight in water.
Drain nuts, pat them dry with paper towels, and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the nuts in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes until they turn golden brown and are slightly crispy. Remove from heat when ready to add other ingredients.
In a separate pan over medium heat, sauté garlic, paprika, and cumin seeds in some oil until fragrant. Add the roasted nuts and cook for an additional minute.
Gently stir in saffron strands and mix evenly with the nut mixture.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
